mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns are negative in more than 55% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate exceeding 7.0% indicates severe labor market deterioration that suppresses consumer spending and corporate earnings, driving negative S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in more than 60% of instances when UNRATE crosses above 7.0%, or the signal loses statistical significance after controlling for GDP growth.

mechanism_narrative: Rising real personal income combined with stable inflation signals robust household purchasing power without monetary policy intervention, producing positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: The joint signal yields negative returns in more than 50% of cases, or the interaction term loses statistical significance with a p-value above 0.10 in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production during a post-shock recovery phase reflects rapid capacity utilization and earnings revisions, generating positive short-term S&P 500 momentum.
failure_condition: INDPRO acceleration fails to predict positive 5-day returns in more than 65% of recovery periods, or the predictive alpha decays to zero within 10 trading days.

mechanism_narrative: Increasing housing starts signal expanding residential investment and construction sector earnings, which mechanically lifts S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: HOUST growth correlates negatively with 20-day returns, or Rank IC falls below 0.01 over rolling 2-year windows across multiple market cycles.

mechanism_narrative: Rapid inflation acceleration above 0.4% monthly forces anticipated central bank tightening, compressing equity valuations and producing negative quarterly S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in more than 55% of high-inflation months, or the signal loses predictive power after controlling for concurrent FEDFUNDS movements.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous payroll employment growth and unemployment rate decline confirms a broad-based labor market tightening that boosts corporate revenue expectations and drives positive monthly equity returns.
failure_condition: The combined labor signal yields negative returns in more than 50% of observations, or the interaction effect is statistically indistinguishable from zero in walk-forward validation.

mechanism_narrative: GDP growth deceleration below 1.0% during a late-cycle expansion triggers earnings downgrade cycles and risk-off positioning, resulting in negative quarterly S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: GDP deceleration below 1.0% coincides with positive 60-day returns in more than 60% of historical instances, or the signal fails to outperform a buy-and-hold benchmark.
